title: Fluorescence size exclusion chromatography (FSEC) from ATP13A2 microsomes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jhvg","text":"Using fluorescence size exclusion chromatography (FSEC) to analyze ATP13A2 expression in microsomes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"f10ua","text":"Lysis Buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"588ek","text":"50 mM Tris pH 7.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84nv","text":"200 mM NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7cj8i","text":"1 mM EDTA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6qib3","text":"1 mM DTT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bq4km","text":"10% glycerol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"o1og","text":"Plus protease inhibitors (5 µg/mL aprotinin, 5 µg/mL leupeptin, 1 µg/mL pepstatin A, and 2 mM PMSF)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e5aou","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5rn7e","text":"Running Buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9p5kf","text":"25 mM Tris pH 7.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fn5e0","text":"100 mM NaCl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8523o","text":"1 mM EDTA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"569re","text":"0.03% DDM/ 0.006% CHS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Resuspend microsomes in Lysis Buffer and final volume 1% DDM/0.2% CHS (1X pellet, 3X Lysis Buffer, 1X 5% DDM/1% CHS) at 4 °C
Solubilize by rotating end-over-end for 2 h at 4C
Clarify lysate by spinning at 17000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour
Equilibrate Superose 6 column, connected to an HPLC system, with Running Buffer
Inject 85 uL of lysate into HPLC
Monitor elution of GFP-tagged ATP13A2 constructs using a fluorometer (λex= 475 nm; λem= 510 nm; with a fixed gain) connected to the system
creator: Sue Sim
